posts.author: thegatewaybandit
posts.title: NEW: Justice Department  Sues Minnesota for Allowing Boys in Girls’ Sports and Intimate Spaces

link_metadata.description: The Department of Justice filed a lawsuit against the Minnesota Department of Education (MDE) and the Minnesota State High School League (MSHSL) on Monday, alleging sex-based discrimination by allowing boys to compete in girls' sports and use girls' locker rooms and bathrooms.  Minnesota Governor Tim Walz is a well-known advocate for these policies, and he infamously signed a 2023 law, directing all public schools to provide free menstrual products to all menstruating students, including trans students, in grades 4 to 12.
link_metadata.title: NEW: Justice Department Sues Minnesota for Allowing Boys in Girls’ Sports and Intimate Spaces | The Gateway Pundit | by Jordan Conradson
